summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Guardian Consulting Group (CGCG) is a security-forward, AI-first Managed IT and Advisory Firm serving start-ups to Fortune 500 companies with services ranging from managed IT and cybersecurity to low voltage cabling and cloud management.

## Key Details
- **Company Name**: Cyber Guardian Consulting Group (CGCG)
- **Founded**: 2015
- **Location**: New York
- **Core Focus**: Managed IT & Cybersecurity (MSP/MSSP)
- **Target Clients**: Start-ups to Fortune 500, with emphasis on small- and medium-sized businesses
- **Key Differentiator**: 7-Layer Cyber Armor System™, proprietary proactive security solutions, Fortune 100 experience for SMBs
- **Main Service Categories**:
  - Managed IT Services
  - Cybersecurity Solutions (SOCaaS, CISOaaS)
  - Cloud Management (AWS, Azure, Google)
  - Low Voltage Cabling & Infrastructure
  - Business Phone, App Development, Door Access Control, Cloud-Based Security Cameras
  - Backup & Disaster Recovery
  - ERP Solutions, Healthcare IT
  - Advisory Services (CIOaaS, CTOaaS)
  - Private Digital Investigations, Reputation Management, Recycling & Charity
